 IMAGENET_MEAN = [0.5, 0.5, 0.5]

@@ -23,6 +27,25 @@
 ACTION_DIM = 7

 DEVICE = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

 TOKENIZER_ID = "google/paligemma-3b-pt-224"

+

+

+def euler_from_ee_state(ee_state):

+    """Return (pos_3, euler_3_rad) from an ee_state vector."""

+    pos = ee_state[:3].astype(np.float32)

+    if len(ee_state) == 7:

+        # assume [x, y, z, qw, qx, qy, qz]

+        quat = ee_state[3:7].astype(np.float32)

+        # scipy expects [x, y, z, w]

+        rot = Rotation.from_quat([quat[1], quat[2], quat[3], quat[0]])

+        euler = rot.as_euler('xyz', degrees=False).astype(np.float32)

+        return pos, euler

+    elif len(ee_state) >= 6:

+        # assume pos + euler (6-D)

+        euler = ee_state[3:6].astype(np.float32)

+        return pos, euler

+    else:

+        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported ee_state shape: {ee_state.shape}")

+
